title: A Simplified Procedure to Construct Pandiagonal Magic Squares Multiples of 4
author: Inder J. Taneja
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This work is revised version of author's previous work. It brings  pandiagonal  magic squares of type 4k, i.e., multiple of 4. This means that it is possible to write  pandiagonal  magic squares of orders 4, 8, 12, etc. with equal sums magic squares of order 4. The procedure is based on half-sequential numbers entries. This works brings  pandiagonal  magic squares up to order 32. Total work is up to order 108. An  excel file  of complete work is attached for download.

keywords: Magic squares, Pandiagonal magic squares,  Block-wise magic squares
